note: caption = on-screen text; speak = TTS-friendly text fed to the voiceover generator. One entry per scene, in order.

lines.caption: affiliate-mcp Hosted — your affiliate data, right inside Claude.
lines.speak: This is affiliate MCP Hosted. All your affiliate data, right inside Claude.

lines.caption: No install. No terminal. Built for people who just want answers.
lines.speak: No install. No terminal. It is built for the people who just want answers, not a setup guide.

lines.caption: Sign in with your email, then connect your networks in a guided dashboard.
lines.speak: Sign in with your email, then connect your networks in a simple, guided dashboard.

lines.caption: Then just ask: “show my unpaid commissions on Awin.”
lines.speak: Now, just ask. For example: show my unpaid commissions on Awin from the last thirty days.

lines.caption: It works while you sleep: weekly reports and alerts, by email.
lines.speak: It even works while you sleep. Weekly reports and anomaly alerts arrive in your inbox on a schedule.

lines.caption: Your keys are encrypted, and never shared with Claude.
lines.speak: Your keys are encrypted, used only to serve you, and never shared with Claude.

lines.caption: Start free. Upgrade only when it's earning its keep.
lines.speak: Start completely free. Upgrade only when the automation is earning its keep.

lines.caption: Sign in with your email at agenticaffiliate.ai
lines.speak: affiliate MCP Hosted. Sign in with your email, at agentic affiliate dot A.I.
